title: There Is No Try
description: Pyramid: 1/2/3/4/8/4/3/2/1 min with builds within each interval
purpose: FTP development via progressive pyramid structure

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 105%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 105% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/9. 1:00 at 105%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 105% for 1:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 18% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 12 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/9. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2/9. 19% complete. Hold 108% steady. 47 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 19% complete. Block 2/9. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/9. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 12 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 2/9.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/9. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 22% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 24% complete. Block 3/9. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/9. 110% at 85-90 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 3/9. 110% for 3:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 3/9. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into session. Seated at 85-90 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:30 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 29% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 29% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 4: 4:00 at 112%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% through session. Block 4/9. You've done 6min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 4/9.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 4: 112% for 4:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 4: 4:00 at 112%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 5 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 4/9. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 27 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 25 minutes in. 115% at 90-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 4 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 115%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 24min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 24min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 20 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 36 minutes in. 112% at 90-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 112%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 0 intervals left. 18 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 22min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 18 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 42 minutes of threshold work done. Block 7/9. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% through session. Block 7/9. You've done 22min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 15 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 7/9. 15 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45 minutes of work done. 14 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 14 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 77% complete. Block 8/9. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 8/9. 77% complete. Hold 108% steady. 12 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 47 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 8: 2:00 at 108%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 1 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 80% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 27min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 49 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 1:00 at 105%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 1:00 at 105%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 105% × 1:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 51 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 83% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
